case_title: MAYOCK, ROBERT S. vs. ADVANCE BUSINESS COMPUTERS, INC.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYOCK, ROBERT S. AS TO DEFENDANT ADVANCE BUSINESS COMPUTERS, INC. STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYOCK, ROBERT S.

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/MILES E. LOCKER AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT W/KERRY KENNEDY AS COUNSEL. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - $10,865 PRINCIPAL W/$750 OF THE SUM REPRESENTING ATTY. FEES - JUDGMENT TO BE PD IN INSTALL. OF $2,000 ON 12-7-93, 1-15-94, 2-15-94 & 3-15-94 FOR A TOTAL OF $8,000 - IF PMTS. AREN'T MADE IN TIMELY FASH- ION, FULL AMT. OF $10,865 WILL BE DUE - AFTER ALL INSTALL. MADE, PL. WILL FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ADVANCE BUSINESS COMPUTERS, INC.
DECLARATION RE: DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS FILED BY THIRD PARTY STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-17-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $8,872.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ADVANCE BUSINESS COMPUTERS, INC.
NOTICE TO DEFENDANT TO BE REPRESENTED BY ATTY. AT TRIAL DE NOVO FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYOCK, ROBERT S.
NOTICE OF REPRESENTATION OF RESPONDENT FILED BY THIRD PARTY STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADVANCE BUSINESS COMPUTERS, INC. $10,115.00 PRINCIPAL, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,865.00, JUDGMENT TO BE PD IN INSTALLMENTS OF $2,000 ON 12-7-93, 1-15-94, 2-15-94 & 3-15-94 FOR TOTAL OF $8,000. IF ANY PMT. IS MISSED, TOTAL OF $10,865 WILL BE DUE. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-05-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
